title: TNPL Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 07 General Manager, Assistant Manager Posts
description: The Tamilnadu Newsprint and Papers (TNPL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 07 General Manager, Deputy General Manager, Assistant General Manager, and Assistant Manager Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, Any Degree, Post-graduation, Diploma, MBA, and PGDM, can apply for the TNPL Notification 2026. The interested applica...
